text:
A1Gう is the 3rd track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .
Lyrics: mpi
Vocals: Aimee Blackschleger

Title

In the solfège system, "A" and "G" would be the notes "la" and "sol". In Japanese, 1 is called "ichi" (abbreviated "i") and the hiragana うmeans "u". Combined, "la-i-so-u" becomes a homophone for"Raisō" (Thunder Spear).

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of DOA.

Lyrics

 
 
English= 
Keep your weapons aimed
Here come the chilling face
Pushing down your fear
Jump on the necks of the monsters
You can't hide yourself
You can't run
We're fighting for our lives
And we just can't lose again
There's not much time
Be ready to fight
Do it.
